title: Intensely Smoky Croatian Meat Skewers
description: Smoky and crispy Croatian meat skewers featuring red chilli flakes, perfect for a date night, with a simple marinate and dash-friendly preparation.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, red chilli flakes, garlic powder, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the pork cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread 3-4 pork cubes onto each skewer, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the pork is cooked through and slightly charred.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh parsley or thyme if desired.
Repeat the cooking process for any remaining skewers.
